videos.headline: Hoffenheim's 2 second-half goals lead them to win over Wolfsburg
videos.title: Hoffenheim's 2 second-half goals lead them to win over Wolfsburg
videos.caption: Jonas Wind scores the impressive goal in the first half for Wolfsburg, but Jacob Bruun Larsen's scissor kick and Andrej Kramaric's late goal give Hoffenheim the 2-1 win.
